distributional_anchor_pilot.permutation_unit: complete label vectors among equal-size case families

clean_reading_longest_match_sensitivity.definition: form has >=1 token occurrence outside record flag ocr? and without token flags damaged/uncertain/restored/emended

morphology.orthography: normalized source forms (token.form), not lossy ASCII projection
